generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values safety and stability, I worry about the recent push to limit domestic security powers. Just last month, a coordinated attack was thwarted thanks to proactive monitoring. Without these tools, how can we protect our communities? Trusted experts agree: balanced security measures are essential. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurNeighbors
